articles.title: Rouble's strength squeezes Russian exporters despite Iran war oil gains
articles.description: PETERSBURG, Russia, June ‌3 - ​A strong rouble is squeezing Russian commodity exporters, offsetting any gains from higher oil prices, and needs to fall to around 90 per U.S. dollar, top Sberbank executive Alexander Vedyakhin told Reuters.

articles.title: Stocks dip on new Iran attacks as oil prices rise
articles.description:
European stocks and U.S. futures fell slightly on Wednesday as oil prices rose for a third session as fresh hostilities flared in the Gulf after U.S.-Iran peace talks stalled.

articles.title: GLOBAL MARKETS-Stocks dip on new Iran attacks as oil prices rise
articles.description: ​futures fell slightly on Wednesday as oil prices rose ‌for ​a third session as fresh hostilities flared in the Gulf after U.S.-Iran peace talks stalled. Europe's STOXX 600 index fell 0.4% in early trading while futures for the U.S. S&P 500 slipped 0.1%.

articles.title: India tightens checks on overseas flows as currency pressure mounts, sources say
articles.description: India increases scrutiny on overseas investments amid rupee pressure from rising oil prices and foreign money outflows.

articles.title: India tightens checks on overseas flows as currency pressure mounts, sources say
articles.description: India's central bank and markets regulator are intensifying scrutiny on overseas investments by firms and family offices, issuing multiple queries to detect potential misuse of investment routes. This move comes amid pressure on the rupee from rising oil prices and foreign outflows, prompting a focus on capital outflow pace and currency impact.

articles.title: Navi Mumbai: Rohit Pawar, Jitendra Awhad Among NCP-SP Leaders Detained As Party Protests Over Recent Petrol, Diesel & LPG Price Hike - WATCH
articles.description: NCP-SP leader Rohit Pawar and other party leaders were detained by police during a protest in Navi Mumbai against recent hikes in petrol, diesel and LPG prices. The party symbolically lit a stove on the street to highlight inflation and unemployment. Pawar said the agitation aimed to draw attention to the daily struggles faced by common citizens.

articles.title: UPDATE 1-Russia's Sberbank says rouble needs to weaken to 90 per US dollar for commodity exporters to 'breathe'
articles.description: (refiles to fix typo in paragraph 5) By Gleb ​Bryanski and Elena Fabrichnaya MOSCOW, June ​3 - A strong rouble ‌is squeezing ​Russian commodity exporters, offsetting any lift in profits from higher oil prices and needs to fall to around ‌90 per U.S. dollar to help companies breathe, top Sberbank executive Alexander Vedyakhin told Reuters.

articles.title: Lisa Jane Spencer: Comedian under fire for ‘diabolical’ skit featuring mock Aboriginal dance, petrol sniffing
articles.description: An Australian comedian has copped a wave of backlash over her controversial skit depicting a white woman ‘transitioning’ to being Aboriginal.

articles.title: Tata Intra V40 bi-fuel pickup launched, expands commercial vehicle portfolio
articles.description: Tata Motors has expanded its alternate-fuel commercial vehicle lineup with the launch of the Intra V40 bi-fuel pickup, offering a 1,525kg payload, CNG-petrol flexibility, and enhanced capability for last-mile cargo operations.

articles.title: 'Petrol bomb' thrown into elderly couple's home after window smashed
articles.description: The pensioners have no idea who targeted them in arson attack as police appeal for information
